title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: mrsirquanzo/Sonny
summary: Grounded multi-agent biomedical research and due-diligence agent. No citation, no claim - every finding traces to a real record (PMID, NCT, patent no.) and is verified by a decorrelated model. Runs locally on Ollama, no API key required.

title: Dev-Art-Solutions/InferHub
summary: Self-hosted LLM inference mesh in .NET. One Ollama-compatible API in front, a pool of GPU worker nodes behind it — run the hub where you have no GPU, run nodes where you do. Pluggable backends (Ollama first).

title: maximpike/vanilla-rag-lab
summary: RAG lab to build and visualise RAG systems

title: camronwood/neural-junkie
summary: Multi-agent orchestration for teams and individuals — local-first AI, custom experts, Slack integration, and collaboration with human approval.

title: marcmarti9/sortix
summary: An intelligent, privacy-first, real-time file organizer with content OCR, EXIF/ID3 rules & local LLM support

title: BGMLAI/gate.cat
summary: Block irreversible AI-agent actions before they run — deterministic, fail-closed action veto for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and other tool-using agents.

title: Nagavenkatasai7/field-guide-builder
summary: Automated LinkedIn field-guide generator: researches a trending topic, writes an illustrated multi-page PDF, and posts it to LinkedIn on a daily schedule. Next.js + Ollama Cloud + Tavily. Configurable author identity, dry-run + kill switch by default. MIT.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: Tamaz-sujashvili/senior-code-mcp
summary: MCP server giving coding agents local semantic + structural memory of a codebase (Qdrant vectors + NetworkX call/import graph, Python ast). Agents reuse proven patterns instead of guessing — saves tokens, raises code quality. Fully local; self-onboards via AGENTS.md.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: raro42/mac-stats
summary: Menu-bar system monitor for Apple Silicon (optional local AI agent). Rust + Tauri. No cloud telemetry.

title: Sina-Amare/promptamp
summary: ⚡ The prompt amplifier — open-source BYOK prompt enhancer for any input field on any site. Chrome · Firefox · Edge

title: Tanos3000/ai-data-analysis-agent
summary: LLM agent that answers natural-language questions about a CSV by writing and safely running its own SQL queries

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 182 + rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: icereed/paperless-gpt
summary: Use LLMs and LLM Vision (OCR) to handle paperless-ngx - Document Digitalization powered by AI

title: wesleysimplicio/simplicio-loop-marketing
summary: Provider-agnostic AI marketing engine. CLI that drops into any host project. Pipeline: brief -> script -> creative -> caption -> compliance -> publish -> metrics -> ads. Switch LLM/image/video provider via env, never via skill rewrite.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
